title: The State of Prediction Markets in 2026
body_text:
By Jane Doe

Published January 2026

# The State of Prediction Markets in 2026

Prediction markets have grown dramatically over the past three years, with total volume reaching $2.1B in 2025. Market participants now include institutional traders, retail investors, and algorithmic strategies.

## Key Trends

Liquidity has improved across all venue types. Spreads on binary outcomes have compressed from 8% average to 3.2% average. The data shows a 40% year-over-year growth in active market participants.

## Market Structure

The prediction market ecosystem now features multiple competing venues with different fee structures and oracle providers. Chart analysis shows volume concentrated in political and sports categories.

## Outlook

We expect continued growth driven by increased legitimacy following regulatory clarity in Q1 2026.
author: Jane Doe
